free_text: Double differential cross sections for neutron
emission induced by 256 MeV and 800 MeV protons
WNR facility at LAMPF
Metal foils (70-150 mg/cm2) located in thin-walled
scattering chambers
Cylindrical liquid scintillators
Includes statistical uncertainty and
Detector efficiency (10.6%/20.0%)
Flux attenuation          (10.0%)
Beam current          (2.0%/5.4%)
Target thickness           (1.5%)
Solid angle    (0.2-0.8%)
Data downloaded from U. Hamburg web site,
31 August 1998.
Approved by W. Scobel, 22 Sept. 1998.
BIB update
On. Major alterations in 002-009.
Detector efficiency normalized to g.s.+0.43-MeV states
Corrected for background and dead time.
On. ERR-1 to ERR-4 added. ANG-CM -> ANG.
Corrected for:
. background,
. dead time,
. flux attenuation due to lead absorber placed in front
of most forward and backward detectors.
Data at ends of spectra, generally below
1.0E-5 MB/SR/MEV eliminated. Changed ANG-CM to ANG.
On. ERR-1 to ERR-4 added.
